hero.title: Your foundation deserves to operate with the same structure as any professional organization.
hero.subtitle: I am an independent software development consultant. I work with foundations and NGOs in Latin America to diagnose, design, and build the systems they need to stop operating in chaos.

painPoints.title: If you got this far, you probably recognize one of these situations.

items.title: Data chaos
items.desc: Information fragmented across multiple Excel files that never match each other.

items.title: Slow reports
items.desc: Days of manual work just to generate an impact report for donors.

items.title: Lack of processes
items.desc: Each team member has their own 'way' of storing and processing information.

items.title: Growth without foundation
items.desc: The foundation grows in impact but the administrative infrastructure is on the verge of collapse.

items.title: Technical costs
items.desc: Hiring an in-house IT team is financially unviable for the annual budget.

items.title: Lack of guidance
items.desc: You know you need technology, but don't know where to start or which tools to choose.

valueProp.title: Software consulting for organizations that do real work.
valueProp.subtitle: I am an independent consultant specialized in the social sector. I work directly with the director or operations team to understand how the organization works. I don't sell boxed software; I build solutions that adapt to your reality, not the other way around.
features: Specific experience in Latin American contexts
valueProp.name: Sebastián Tamayo

process.title: How I work
process.subtitle: A structured process to guarantee measurable results.

steps.title: Diagnosis
steps.desc: We audit your current processes, identify bottlenecks and critical information leaks.

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: We design the technical architecture: data flow diagrams and selection of appropriate tools.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Iterative construction of the solution. You test each advance in real environments.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.desc: Team training, technical documentation and support to ensure total adoption.

items.title: Mobile applications
items.desc: Field data capture for censuses or social program monitoring, even without internet connection.

items.title: Custom internal software
items.desc: Inventory management systems, donor CRM or volunteer coordination platforms.

items.title: Impact dashboards
items.desc: Automated visualization of KPIs and social impact metrics for accountability and decision making.

items.title: Process automation
items.desc: Connecting your current tools to eliminate repetitive manual tasks and reduce human error.

form.title: Is your organization ready to operate differently?
form.subtitle: Fill out the form and let's analyze how technology can scale your impact.

fields.name: problem
fields.label: What is the main software problem you face today?

form.note: I review each request personally. If there's a good starting point, I'll respond in less than 72 hours.

messages.successDesc: We'll review your request and respond in less than 72 hours.
messages.fieldErrorDesc: Some required fields are empty or invalid.
messages.networkErrorDesc: Could not send the request. Try again.
